meta.market_tone: Cautiously optimistic with banking sector strength

deep_dive.full_text:
Banking stocks led the market rally ahead of the RBI policy decision, with HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank showing strong gains. IT sector continued its recovery with Infosys leading the pack. FIIs turned net buyers after several sessions of selling, while DIIs showed mild profit booking.

Market breadth improved significantly with 298 advances against 202 declines on the Nifty 500. The advance-decline ratio suggests broadening participation beyond just large-cap stocks.

Key levels: Nifty support at 24,600-24,650 zone; resistance at 24,900-25,000. Banking index showing relative strength with potential to outperform in the coming sessions.

admin_notes: Strong banking performance drove the market today. FII turnover suggests renewed interest in Indian equities.
